ArtworkRepo.description:
A local artwork repository -- per-collection images dropped on disk.

For each collection, Nalanda looks for
``<path>/collections/<slug>/<type>.<ext>`` where ``<type>`` is ``primary`` /
``thumb`` / ``backdrop``, ``<ext>`` is ``png`` / ``jpg`` / ``jpeg`` / ``webp``,
and ``<slug>`` is the collection name slugified (the same slug used for identity
tags: lowercased, runs of non-alphanumerics hyphenated -- so "A Title:
Subtitle" -> "a-title-subtitle"). A found file is uploaded and its bytes hashed
so an unchanged file isn't re-uploaded. A collection's per-slot
``*_art_url`` / ``*_art_file`` overrides the repo.

path.description: Filesystem root of the artwork repository. Nalanda reads `<path>/collections/<slug>/<primary|thumb|backdrop>.<png|jpg|jpeg|webp>`.
path.title: Path

create_empty_folders.description: Create an empty `<path>/collections/<slug>/` folder for every configured collection, giving you a place to drop artwork.
create_empty_folders.title: Create Empty Folders

delete_old_empty_folders.description: Delete *empty* `<path>/collections/<slug>/` folders whose collection is no longer configured. A folder containing any file is never removed.
delete_old_empty_folders.title: Delete Old Empty Folders

ArtworkRepo.title: ArtworkRepo

BuilderBlock.description:
One ordered block of sources.

A block is resolved in its natural order (a sole single curated list keeps its
order; anything else is release-date sorted). Blocks are concatenated in order via
``CollectionDef.append`` so the user can control cross-block ordering.

match.description: How the block's keys combine: any (union, default) | all (intersection -- a title must match EVERY key).
match.title: Match

tmdb_collection.description: TMDB collection id(s); members are merged and sorted chronologically.
tmdb_collection.title: Tmdb Collection

tmdb_title.description: Title(s) resolved via search, e.g. "A Film Title" or "A Remade Title (1999)" to disambiguate by year. Numeric titles may be unquoted.
tmdb_title.title: Tmdb Title

tmdb_keyword.description: TMDB keyword id(s)/name(s), or {all|any|except: [...]}. A Discover query (bare list = OR), joined chronologically.
tmdb_keyword.title: Tmdb Keyword

tmdb_genre.description: Genre id/name, a bare list (AND), or a {all|any|except: [...]} mapping. A Discover query, joined chronologically.
tmdb_genre.title: Tmdb Genre

tmdb_actor.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); their acting credits.
tmdb_actor.title: Tmdb Actor

tmdb_director.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); titles they directed.
tmdb_director.title: Tmdb Director

tmdb_writer.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); titles they wrote.
tmdb_writer.title: Tmdb Writer

tmdb_producer.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); titles they produced.
tmdb_producer.title: Tmdb Producer

tmdb_crew.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); all their crew credits.
tmdb_crew.title: Tmdb Crew

tmdb_company.description: TMDB production company id(s) or name(s); joined chronologically.
tmdb_company.title: Tmdb Company

tmdb_popular.description: Top N of TMDB's Popular chart.
tmdb_popular.title: Tmdb Popular

tmdb_now_playing.description: Top N of TMDB's Now Playing chart.
tmdb_now_playing.title: Tmdb Now Playing

tmdb_top_rated.description: Top N of TMDB's Top Rated chart.
tmdb_top_rated.title: Tmdb Top Rated

tmdb_upcoming.description: Top N of TMDB's Upcoming chart.
tmdb_upcoming.title: Tmdb Upcoming

tmdb_trending_daily.description: Top N of TMDB's daily Trending chart.
tmdb_trending_daily.title: Tmdb Trending Daily

tmdb_trending_weekly.description: Top N of TMDB's weekly Trending chart.
tmdb_trending_weekly.title: Tmdb Trending Weekly

tmdb_show.description: Individual TMDB show (TV) id(s). The tv analogue of tmdb_movie.
tmdb_show.title: Tmdb Show

tmdb_network.description: TMDB TV network id(s), or {all|any|except: [...]}. The tv analogue of tmdb_company. Networks must be given by id (TMDB has no network name search).
tmdb_network.title: Tmdb Network

tmdb_on_the_air.description: Top N of TMDB's TV On The Air chart (tv only).
tmdb_on_the_air.title: Tmdb On The Air

tmdb_airing_today.description: Top N of TMDB's TV Airing Today chart (tv only).
tmdb_airing_today.title: Tmdb Airing Today

tmdb_discover.description: Raw TMDB Discover query (escape hatch); `limit` is honoured.
tmdb_discover.title: Tmdb Discover

tmdb_list.description: TMDB list id(s), or {all|any|except: [...]} (intersection/union/subtract of lists); kept in curated order.
tmdb_list.title: Tmdb List

mdblist_list.description: MDBList list URL(s)/ref(s), or {url|all|except, sort_by, limit}; curated.
mdblist_list.title: Mdblist List

mdblist_catalog.description: MDBList discover -- filter/sort by cross-source ratings (RT/Metacritic/...).

mdblist_official.description: MDBList official playlist by slug (e.g. 'popular'), or {slug, sort_by, limit}.
mdblist_official.title: Mdblist Official

tvdb_movie.description: TVDB movie id(s)/slug(s)/name(s) (movie only); resolved to TMDB/IMDb ids.
tvdb_movie.title: Tvdb Movie

tvdb_list.description: A TVDB list id or slug; its items of the collection's media, curated order.
tvdb_list.title: Tvdb List

tvdb_discover.description: Raw TVDB filter query (escape hatch: genre/company/country/lang/year/sort); `limit` is honoured. country+lang default to usa/eng.
tvdb_discover.title: Tvdb Discover

BuilderBlock.title: BuilderBlock

CacheSettings.description:
Metadata-cache durations + on/off switch.

Four intent-named knobs each govern a group of internal cache namespaces; the
Radarr/Sonarr add-lookup caches are fixed internal constants, not exposed here.
Durations are ``<int>d`` / ``<int>h`` (or ``0`` / ``off`` to bypass that
bucket); minutes are rejected. The cache file path is not configured here --
it derives from the config directory (see :class:`Secrets`).

enabled.description: Master switch for the metadata cache.
enabled.title: Enabled

record_cache_duration.description: Per-id details + name/id resolution (TMDB, TVDB). <int>d / <int>h, or 0/off to bypass.
record_cache_duration.title: Record Cache Duration

list_cache_duration.description: Membership of curated/dynamic lists (MDBList, TVDB, TMDB lists).
list_cache_duration.title: List Cache Duration

query_cache_duration.description: discover / genre / company / keyword / person queries.
query_cache_duration.title: Query Cache Duration

CacheSettings.title: CacheSettings

CollectionDef.description:
A single collection definition.

The top-level builder keys form the first block; ``append`` adds further ordered
blocks after it. Unknown keys are rejected so typos surface immediately.

match.description: How the block's keys combine: any (union, default) | all (intersection -- a title must match EVERY key).
match.title: Match

tmdb_collection.description: TMDB collection id(s); members are merged and sorted chronologically.
tmdb_collection.title: Tmdb Collection

tmdb_title.description: Title(s) resolved via search, e.g. "A Film Title" or "A Remade Title (1999)" to disambiguate by year. Numeric titles may be unquoted.
tmdb_title.title: Tmdb Title

tmdb_keyword.description: TMDB keyword id(s)/name(s), or {all|any|except: [...]}. A Discover query (bare list = OR), joined chronologically.
tmdb_keyword.title: Tmdb Keyword

tmdb_genre.description: Genre id/name, a bare list (AND), or a {all|any|except: [...]} mapping. A Discover query, joined chronologically.
tmdb_genre.title: Tmdb Genre

tmdb_actor.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); their acting credits.

tmdb_director.description: TMDB person id(s) or name(s); titles they directed.

tmdb_company.description: TMDB production company id(s) or name(s); joined chronologically.

tmdb_top_rated.description: Top N of TMDB's Top Rated chart.

tmdb_trending_daily.description: Top N of TMDB's daily Trending chart.

tmdb_trending_weekly.description: Top N of TMDB's weekly Trending chart.

tmdb_show.description: Individual TMDB show (TV) id(s). The tv analogue of tmdb_movie.
tmdb_show.title: Tmdb Show

tmdb_network.description: TMDB TV network id(s), or {all|any|except: [...]}. The tv analogue of tmdb_company. Networks must be given by id (TMDB has no network name search).

tmdb_on_the_air.description: Top N of TMDB's TV On The Air chart (tv only).
tmdb_on_the_air.title: Tmdb On The Air

tmdb_airing_today.description: Top N of TMDB's TV Airing Today chart (tv only).
tmdb_airing_today.title: Tmdb Airing Today

tmdb_discover.description: Raw TMDB Discover query (escape hatch); `limit` is honoured.
tmdb_discover.title: Tmdb Discover

tmdb_list.description: TMDB list id(s), or {all|any|except: [...]} (intersection/union/subtract of lists); kept in curated order.
tmdb_list.title: Tmdb List

mdblist_list.description: MDBList list URL(s)/ref(s), or {url|all|except, sort_by, limit}; curated.

mdblist_catalog.description: MDBList discover -- filter/sort by cross-source ratings (RT/Metacritic/...).

mdblist_official.description: MDBList official playlist by slug (e.g. 'popular'), or {slug, sort_by, limit}.
mdblist_official.title: Mdblist Official

tvdb_movie.description: TVDB movie id(s)/slug(s)/name(s) (movie only); resolved to TMDB/IMDb ids.
tvdb_movie.title: Tvdb Movie

tvdb_list.description: A TVDB list id or slug; its items of the collection's media, curated order.
tvdb_list.title: Tvdb List

tvdb_discover.description: Raw TVDB filter query (escape hatch: genre/company/country/lang/year/sort); `limit` is honoured. country+lang default to usa/eng.
tvdb_discover.title: Tvdb Discover

media.description: What this collection builds: movie (Radarr / Jellyfin movie libraries), tv (Sonarr / Jellyfin show libraries), or mixed (one BoxSet holding both, driving Radarr AND Sonarr). Selects the client(s), library type(s), and the movie-vs-TV dialect of shared builder keys -- in a mixed collection a shared key (genre, people, charts, mdblist, ...) produces BOTH movies and shows. Required.
media.title: Media

append.description: Further ordered blocks, each resolved independently and concatenated after the first block.
append.title: Append

overview.description: Overview text for the collection; overrides any source metadata.
overview.title: Overview

tmdb_overview.description: TMDB collection id whose overview is fetched at runtime and used as the collection overview -- for merges, where there is no sole source to auto-fill from. A literal `overview` overrides it.
tmdb_overview.title: Tmdb Overview

sort_title.description: Sort title used to position the collection itself.
sort_title.title: Sort Title

primary_art_url.description: Primary (poster) image URL; Jellyfin downloads it. Overrides the artwork repo and the auto-sourced TMDB poster. Exclusive with `primary_art_file`.
primary_art_url.title: Primary Art Url

primary_art_file.description: Path to a local Primary (poster) image; its bytes are uploaded. Exclusive with `primary_art_url`.
primary_art_file.title: Primary Art File

thumb_art_url.description: Thumb (landscape title card) image URL; Jellyfin downloads it. Overrides the artwork repo and the auto-sourced TMDB titled backdrop. Exclusive with `thumb_art_file`.
thumb_art_url.title: Thumb Art Url

thumb_art_file.description: Path to a local Thumb (landscape title card) image; its bytes are uploaded. Exclusive with `thumb_art_url`.
thumb_art_file.title: Thumb Art File

backdrop_art_url.description: Backdrop (fanart) image URL; Jellyfin downloads it. Overrides the artwork repo and the auto-sourced TMDB textless backdrop. Exclusive with `backdrop_art_file`.
backdrop_art_url.title: Backdrop Art Url

backdrop_art_file.description: Path to a local Backdrop (fanart) image; its bytes are uploaded. Exclusive with `backdrop_art_url`.
backdrop_art_file.title: Backdrop Art File

sync_mode.description: Per-collection override of the global sync_mode.
sync_mode.title: Sync Mode

hide_year.description: Override the global hide_year for this collection (empty its year + release-date fields). Unset = use the global setting.
hide_year.title: Hide Year

run_schedule.description: Per-collection run-schedule override (level 3, the most specific): a name in `settings.run_schedules`, an inline cron, or 'none'/'disabled' to never schedule it. Unset inherits `settings.jobs.collections`, then `settings.run_schedule`. Only the daemon `serve` schedules; this collection still runs on demand via webhook or manual `run`.
run_schedule.title: Run Schedule

order.description: Display order: source (as built, DisplayOrder=Default) | sort_name | release_date. When unset, defaults to release_date if the collection is release-sorted at build (single/merged collections, query builders) or source for a sole curated list (charts, tmdb_list, mdblist_list).
order.title: Order

limit.description: Cap each broad query builder (genre/keyword/company/people/discover) to this many titles, most-popular-first. Defaults to 100; set 0 for unlimited.
limit.title: Limit

libraries.description: Jellyfin libraries (by name) to match within; omit for all libraries of the collection's media type (movie or tv).
libraries.title: Libraries

section.description: Name of a top-level `sections` entry. Gives the collection an auto-generated sort title so sections group together, in the order declared.
section.title: Section

radarr.description: Radarr sync + identity-tag options. Set `enable: true` to opt the collection into Radarr management (the block is inert otherwise); other fields inherit the global `settings.radarr` defaults. `movie` or `mixed` collections only.

sonarr.description: Sonarr sync + identity-tag options (the TV analogue of `radarr:`). Set `enable: true` to opt the collection into Sonarr management (inert otherwise); other fields inherit the global `settings.sonarr` defaults. `tv` or `mixed` only.

CollectionDef.title: CollectionDef

GlobalSettings.description: Top-level settings applied to all collections unless overridden.

sync_mode.description: Default sync mode: append = add only; sync = also remove items no longer in the source. Overridable per collection.
sync_mode.title: Sync Mode

language.description: TMDB language tag for text metadata (titles, overviews, genre names): ISO 639-1, optionally with a region (e.g. en, en-US, en-GB, fr-FR, pt-BR). Affects TMDB text only -- not artwork selection, and not TVDB (always English today).
language.title: Language

region.description: TMDB region (ISO 3166-1, e.g. US/GB) -- separate from `language`'s region suffix; it localises release dates on charts/discover only.
region.title: Region

hide_year.description: Empty a collection's year + release-date fields (a single year on a whole collection is meaningless). Overridable per collection.
hide_year.title: Hide Year

delete_unconfigured_collections.description: On a full run, delete Nalanda-managed collections (ones it previously created) that are no longer in the config. Never touches collections it didn't make.
delete_unconfigured_collections.title: Delete Unconfigured Collections

unlock_unconfigured_metadata.description: When a per-item metadata entry/field is removed from config, unlock it in Jellyfin (remove the field lock; clear a managed sort title) so a refresh can reclaim it. Default false: removed entries are left locked, like delete_unconfigured_collections.
unlock_unconfigured_metadata.title: Unlock Unconfigured Metadata

radarr.description: Global Radarr sync + tagging defaults. Per-collection `radarr:` blocks override these. Omit if not using Radarr.

sonarr.description: Global Sonarr sync + tagging defaults (the TV analogue). Per-collection `sonarr:` blocks override these. Omit if not using Sonarr.

webhook.description: Inbound-request behaviour of the `nalanda serve` daemon (debounce/gating).

run_schedules.description: Optional named cron strings (e.g. {daily: '0 4 * * *'}), referenced by name from `run_schedule`, `jobs.*`, or a collection's `run_schedule:`. Purely for reuse -- a schedule reference may also be an inline cron string instead of a name.
run_schedules.title: Run Schedules

run_schedule.description: Global default run schedule for every job (level 1 of the cascade): a name in `run_schedules`, an inline cron, or 'none'/'disabled' = off. Overridden per job-kind by `jobs.*` and per collection by a collection's `run_schedule:`. The daemon `serve` reads this; one-off `run` ignores it.
run_schedule.title: Run Schedule

jobs.description: Per-job-kind default run schedules (level 2 of the cascade); override the global `run_schedule` for that kind.

GlobalSettings.title: GlobalSettings

JobSchedules.description:
Per-job-kind default run schedules (level 2 of the run-schedule cascade).

Each value is a schedule *reference*: a key in ``settings.run_schedules``, an
inline cron string, or the sentinel ``none`` / ``disabled`` (opt out). Two job
kinds are wired: ``collections`` (the collection build/reconcile job) and
``metadata`` (the per-item metadata job). Unknown kinds are rejected so a
typo'd key surfaces immediately.

collections.description: Default run schedule for the collection build/reconcile job. A name in `settings.run_schedules`, an inline cron, or 'none'/'disabled'. Overrides the global `settings.run_schedule`; a per-collection `run_schedule:` overrides this in turn.
collections.title: Collections

metadata.description: Default run schedule for the per-item metadata job. A name in `settings.run_schedules`, an inline cron, or 'none'/'disabled'. Overrides the global `settings.run_schedule` for this job.
metadata.title: Metadata

JobSchedules.title: JobSchedules

MdblistCatalog.description:
MDBList's discover (`/catalog/movie` or `/catalog/show`) -- filter/sort by
cross-source ratings.
MdblistCatalog.title: MdblistCatalog

MdblistFilter.description:
One or more MDBList lists, combined and (optionally) sorted/capped.

``url`` is one or more list refs (union); ``all`` intersects lists;
``except`` subtracts a list's titles. ``sort_by`` is ``"<field>.<asc|desc>"`` (e.g.
``imdbrating.desc``); ``limit`` caps each fetch.

all.description: Only titles in ALL these lists.
all.title: All

limit.description: Max titles to take from each list.
limit.title: Limit

MdblistFilter.title: MdblistFilter

MetadataConfig.description:
Per-item metadata overrides, grouped by media so id-to-library routing is
unambiguous.

movies.description: Per-movie metadata overrides, normally keyed by tmdb or imdb id (any one provider id is accepted).
movies.title: Movies

shows.description: Per-series metadata overrides, normally keyed by tvdb, or tmdb/imdb (any one provider id is accepted).
shows.title: Shows

MetadataConfig.title: MetadataConfig

MetadataEntry.description:
One item's metadata overrides, keyed by a single provider id.

Exactly one of ``tmdb`` / ``imdb`` / ``tvdb`` identifies the item (movies are
normally tmdb/imdb, shows tvdb/tmdb/imdb); at least one override field must be
set. Each declared field is written to Jellyfin; the lockable fields
(parental_rating, title, overview) are locked so a metadata refresh cannot
overwrite them, and sort_title persists via ForcedSortName (re-asserted each run).

parental_rating.description: Jellyfin Parental Rating (OfficialRating), e.g. GB-15 or 15. Written and locked. A bare number (a UK/AU rating) is accepted and stored as a string.
parental_rating.title: Parental Rating

sort_title.description: Sort Title (ForcedSortName). Sticky across normal refreshes; Nalanda re-asserts it each run, but a replace-all-metadata refresh in Jellyfin can still clear it.
sort_title.title: Sort Title

MetadataEntry.title: MetadataEntry

RadarrDefaults.description:
Global Radarr sync + tagging defaults.

Per-collection ``radarr:`` blocks override any of these. All four ``add_*``/
``*_existing`` toggles default **false**: with everything off, a
Radarr-managed collection is a no-op until you opt into adding and/or tagging.

add_missing.description: Add collection movies that aren't yet in Radarr.
add_missing.title: Add Missing

add_existing.description: Apply the identity tag to collection movies already in Radarr (the 'if-exists' half of tagging; decoupled from adding).
add_existing.title: Add Existing

upgrade_existing.description: Reset existing members' quality profile to the collection's (diff-first).
upgrade_existing.title: Upgrade Existing

monitor_existing.description: Reset existing members' monitored flag to `monitored`.
monitor_existing.title: Monitor Existing

search.description: Trigger a Radarr search when adding a movie (fully decoupled from tagging).
search.title: Search

minimum_availability.description: Radarr minimum availability for added movies.
minimum_availability.title: Minimum Availability

quality_profile.description: Quality profile name or id for added (and upgraded) movies.
quality_profile.title: Quality Profile

root_folder.description: Root folder path for added movies.
root_folder.title: Root Folder

tag_prefix.description: Namespace prefix for Nalanda identity tags. Nalanda only ever adds/removes tags under this prefix, never touching manual or other-tool tags.
tag_prefix.title: Tag Prefix

stale_tags.description: What happens to a movie's identity tag when it leaves a collection: delete it, mark it (swap to <tag><stale_suffix>), or keep it.
stale_tags.title: Stale Tags

stale_suffix.description: Suffix appended to the identity tag for the `mark` policy.
stale_suffix.title: Stale Suffix

RadarrDefaults.title: RadarrDefaults

enable.description: Opt this collection into *arr management. Defaults to false, so a block with `enable` unset or false is inert (no add/tag/search) -- doubling as an off switch.
enable.title: Enable

tag.description: Override the identity tag's auto-slug (final label = tag_prefix + this). Defaults to a slug of the collection name.
tag.title: Tag

SelectFilter.description:
An include/exclude operator mapping, shared by genre, people and company keys.

``all`` (AND) / ``any`` (OR) select values to INCLUDE; they are mutually exclusive.
``except`` lists values to EXCLUDE -- a filter that drops any title matching one of
them, and may stand alone (pruning the rest of the block) or accompany ``all`` /
``any``. Entries are ids or names (the two may be mixed). At least one must be set.

Semantics differ by attribute: genres combine server-side (with_genres) and
except is an attribute filter; people/company combine as client-side set algebra
(all=intersection, any=union, except=subtract that source's titles).

all.description: Include titles matching ALL of these (AND / intersection).
all.title: All

any.description: Include titles matching ANY of these (OR / union).
any.title: Any

except.description: Exclude any title matching these (a filter, not a source).
except.title: Except

SelectFilter.title: SelectFilter

SonarrDefaults.description:
Global Sonarr sync + tagging defaults (the TV analogue of RadarrDefaults).

Per-collection ``sonarr:`` blocks override any of these. The
``add_*``/``*_existing`` toggles default **false**, so even an enabled
collection adds/tags nothing until you opt in.

add_missing.description: Add collection shows not yet in Sonarr.
add_missing.title: Add Missing

add_existing.description: Apply the identity tag to shows already in Sonarr.
add_existing.title: Add Existing

upgrade_existing.description: Reset existing members' quality profile to the collection's.
upgrade_existing.title: Upgrade Existing

monitor_existing.description: Reconcile existing members' `monitored` flag and season monitoring to `monitor` each run (season sync via Sonarr's seasonpass).
monitor_existing.title: Monitor Existing

monitored.description: Series-level monitored flag for added shows.
monitored.title: Monitored

monitor.description: Episode/season monitoring strategy for added shows (and, with monitor_existing, reconciled): all | future | missing | existing | pilot | first_season | latest_season | none.
monitor.title: Monitor

search.description: Search for missing episodes when adding a show (decoupled from tagging).
search.title: Search

cutoff_search.description: Also search for cutoff-unmet episodes when adding.
cutoff_search.title: Cutoff Search

quality_profile.description: Quality profile name or id for added (and upgraded) shows.
quality_profile.title: Quality Profile

language_profile.description: Language profile name or id (Sonarr v3 only; ignored on v4 which dropped them).
language_profile.title: Language Profile

root_folder.description: Root folder path for added shows.
root_folder.title: Root Folder

tag_prefix.description: Namespace prefix for Nalanda identity tags; Nalanda only ever touches this.
tag_prefix.title: Tag Prefix

stale_tags.description: What happens to a show's identity tag when it leaves a collection: delete | mark (swap to <tag><stale_suffix>) | keep.
stale_tags.title: Stale Tags

stale_suffix.description: Suffix appended to the identity tag for the `mark` policy.
stale_suffix.title: Stale Suffix

SonarrDefaults.title: SonarrDefaults

enable.description: Opt this collection into *arr management. Defaults to false, so a block with `enable` unset or false is inert (no add/tag/search) -- doubling as an off switch.
enable.title: Enable

tag.description: Override the identity tag's auto-slug (final label = tag_prefix + this). Defaults to a slug of the collection name.
tag.title: Tag

WebhookSettings.description:
Behaviour of the ``nalanda serve`` webhook daemon (coalescing + gating of
inbound requests).

Time-driven scheduling lives in ``settings.run_schedules`` /
``settings.run_schedule`` / ``settings.jobs``, not here -- a cron is not a
webhook concern. The bind address/port are *deployment* knobs, not behaviour,
so they live in the environment / ``.env`` (``NALANDA_HOST`` /
``NALANDA_PORT``; see :class:`Secrets`), not here. The state/cache file paths
derive from the config dir.

debounce_seconds.description: Coalesce a burst of triggers into one run; the window resets on each new trigger and the run fires once it's been quiet this long.
debounce_seconds.title: Debounce Seconds

max_wait_seconds.description: Optional cap on total debounce wait, so a sustained burst can't postpone the run indefinitely.
max_wait_seconds.title: Max Wait Seconds

allow_full_run.description: Permit POST /run to trigger a full run. Off -> /run returns 403; /trigger is always scoped and never runs everything.
allow_full_run.title: Allow Full Run

WebhookSettings.title: WebhookSettings

sections.description: Ordered section names. A collection's `section` gives it a sort title prefixed by the section's position here, so sections group together in this order in the Jellyfin library view.
sections.title: Sections

artwork_repo.description: Optional local artwork repository: per-collection images on disk, found by slugified name under `<path>/collections/`.

metadata.description: Per-item metadata overrides written and locked into Jellyfin (parental_rating, title, overview, sort_title), grouped by media.
